SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-02-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-21-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 655 THIRD STREET ASSOCIATES, L.P. C/O BRETT & CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLOMBANO, MARCUS V. AVANTGARDE, INC. $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,400.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE SUBJECT JUDGMENT IS FULLY SATISFIED BY PLAINTIFF'S RETENTION OF DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COLOMBANO, MARCUS V. AVANTGARDE, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT 655 THIRD STREET ASSOCIATES, L.P. C/O BRETT & CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
